title: Fresh Animations - What In Blazes?
description: A pack that aims to spice up the minecraft blazes by adding colour and armor variations. (requires fresh animations)
body:
# What In Blazes?
[Discord](https://discord.gg/DSQPNbDW7r)

Since I first started playing minecraft, I have had a fascination with mobs.
And I've noticed something.
The textures repeat.
Over, and over, and over, again.
It's the same with the shapes and overlays.
The same with the animations (but with the new fresh animations update not so much).
It get's boring, fast.

And I thought: what if I could make a ridiculous amount of textures for these high-heated guys.
So I dove into making texture, after texture, after texture, until I had around thirty.

## This pack contains all of them!
Now blazes will appear with a fire colour, complete with custom armor. (the colours even match what elements burn in colour in reality, excluding soul fire of course)

Some of the types you may find are:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

0. Red blaze, (strontium fire)
1. Yellow blaze, (sodium fire)
2. Blue blaze, (soul fire)
3. Green blaze, (copper fire)
4. Smoke blaze, (carbon)
5. Bearded,
6. Shielded,
7. Armored rings,
8. Classic,
9. Vented,
10. Bearded + armored 1,
11. Bearded + armored 2,

</details>

### Requirements
This pack requires [fresh animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) to work, along with [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures).

To work, this pack must be activated/turned on/equiped/enabled AFTER fresh animations.

### One last thing
If you like my packs: please consider supporting and/or donating to me on [Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/limeimortal), 
My Ko-Fi supporters also get a say in what packs I make next.
It helps so much, and means a lot.

Also: for anyone wanting a custom pack made for them; also send a dm to Lime_void on the Imortals Packs discord with your specific suggestion, your reason (if you have one) and a colour pallet if you want, a size, a name (optional) and what mod (or base minecraft) it should be for within.
